name: @zivego/n8n-nodes-dfir-iris
description: DFIR IRIS node integration for n8n with stable and next API support

scripts.build: npm run check:node && npm run clean && n8n-node build && npm run prune:dist
scripts.build:container: docker run --rm --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" -v "$PWD:/workspace" -w /workspace node:20-bookworm bash -lc "npx -y pnpm@10.22.0 install --frozen-lockfile && npx -y pnpm@10.22.0 run build"
scripts.pack:tarball: npm run build && npm pack --pack-destination artifacts
scripts.pack:container: docker run --rm --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" -v "$PWD:/workspace" -w /workspace node:20-bookworm bash -lc "npx -y pnpm@10.22.0 install --frozen-lockfile && npx -y pnpm@10.22.0 run pack:tarball"
scripts.release:check: npm run build && npm run validate:types && npm run validate:package
scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run validate:types
